gist.headline: Daily Paper Delivered
gist.blurb: The daily automated README update is here, keeping the front page fresh with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community applications.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date information on recent developments and community contributions.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a paperboy or updating a bulletin board. A cute pixel art bulletin board with fresh news clippings.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning fresh paper notes to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NEWS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
